articles.title: Senate Hearing Exposes Years-Long Suppression of COVID Vaccine-Cancer Link
articles.summary: Multiple oncologists testified that stable cancer patients experienced aggressive relapses after COVID boosters, with researchers reporting systematic attacks on their reputations for investigating the connection. The hearing revealed coordinated suppression of evidence linking mRNA vaccines to increased cancer risk.

articles.title: Academic Journal Caves to Legal Threats, Retracts Paper Criticizing Parental Alienation Theory
articles.summary: The Integrated Journal for Research in Arts and Humanities retracted a critical analysis of parental alienation theory after receiving legal threats from supporters of the controversial concept. This represents a direct assault on academic freedom and scientific inquiry through intimidation.

articles.title: Major Medical Journal Caught Hiding Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data in Elderly
articles.summary: A prestigious medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's negative efficacy data for flu vaccines in seniors, exposing the corrupt relationship between Big Pharma and medical publishing. This selective data reporting puts elderly patients at risk while protecting pharmaceutical profits.

articles.title: FDA Medical Authoritarians Target Health Freedom Movement in Systematic Suppression Campaign
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney Jonathan Emord and health freedom advocates expose how the U.S. government and FDA have systematically attacked alternative health approaches and decentralized medicine. The medical establishment is using regulatory capture to eliminate competition and patient choice.

articles.title: Metabolic Cancer Research Reveals What Big Pharma Doesn't Want You to Know
articles.summary: Breakthrough bioinformatics study maps metabolic reprogramming in lung and breast cancer, revealing therapeutic targets that don't rely on expensive pharmaceutical interventions. This metabolic approach to cancer treatment threatens the trillion-dollar oncology drug market.

articles.title: Natural Compound Capsaicin Shows Anti-Cancer Efficacy While Pharma Ignores Cheap Alternatives
articles.summary: Research demonstrates capsaicin's powerful antitumor effects in estrogen-positive breast cancer through metabolic reprogramming pathways. The pharmaceutical industry continues to ignore promising natural compounds that can't be patented for massive profits.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Report Exposes Unprecedented Public Health Catastrophe
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the devastating health, economic, and social damage caused by lockdowns and COVID policies that were implemented despite lack of scientific evidence. Public health officials systematically ignored available data showing policy failures.

articles.title: Government Imprisons Citizens for Hantavirus Exposure in Medical Tyranny Escalation
articles.summary: Authorities are now jailing people for potential virus exposure, representing a dangerous precedent in medical authoritarianism that extends far beyond COVID policies. This criminalization of health status threatens fundamental civil liberties under the guise of public health.

articles.title: Senate Forced to Investigate COVID Vaccine Cancer Links After Regulatory Capture Exposed
articles.summary: U.S. Senate hearing on June 2 will finally examine biological mechanisms linking COVID-19 vaccines to increased cancer risks. This represents a stunning reversal after years of suppressed safety signals and buried adverse event data by captured regulatory agencies.

articles.title: Cancer's Metabolic Blueprint Proves Warburg Was Right All Along
articles.summary: New study mapping metabolic reprogramming in lung and breast cancer validates decades-old metabolic theories of cancer that Big Pharma systematically buried. Tumor cells hijack metabolism to survive - yet oncology continues pushing toxic chemo over metabolic interventions.

articles.title: Journal Caves to Legal Threats, Retracts Paper Exposing Junk Psychology Theory
articles.summary: Academic journal retracted research criticizing 'parental alienation' theory after litigation threats from advocacy groups. This represents the weaponization of lawsuits to silence scientific criticism and protect profitable psychological constructs.

articles.title: Capsaicin Triggers Metabolic Cancer Kill Switch - But Don't Expect FDA Approval
articles.summary: Research identifies how capsaicin disrupts metabolic reprogramming in ER-positive breast cancer through previously unknown molecular targets. Natural compounds with proven anti-cancer effects remain buried while pharma pushes patentable synthetics.

articles.title: COVID Lockdowns Destroyed Economy: 12% GDP Lost, Dollar Purchasing Power Halved
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals lockdown policies caused 12% GDP loss and destroyed half of dollar purchasing power since 2020. The economic carnage from suppressed early treatment protocols and ignored Swedish model data continues mounting.

articles.title: Major Journal Caught Burying Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data in Seniors
articles.summary: Leading medical journal under fire for omitting Pfizer's failed flu vaccine efficacy data in elderly patients. This represents standard practice of selective data publication to maintain vaccine narratives while burying inconvenient safety and efficacy failures.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Finally Documented - The Carnage Was Preventable
articles.summary: Comprehensive documentation reveals the systematic damage caused by COVID policies that ignored established science on respiratory viruses. The suppression of early treatment protocols and natural immunity data led to preventable deaths and societal destruction.

articles.title: Whistleblower Jailed for Exposing Hantavirus Lab Safety Violations
articles.summary: Government employee imprisoned for hantavirus exposure while attempting to expose laboratory safety violations. This case demonstrates the systematic persecution of scientific whistleblowers who threaten institutional biosafety narratives.

articles.title: Brownstone Institute Exposes Hantavirus Criminalization — Public Health Paranoia Reaches New Low
articles.summary: Health authorities are now jailing people for potential hantavirus exposure, turning disease contact into a criminal offense. This represents the complete medicalization of civil liberties, where public health emergency powers override basic constitutional protections.

articles.title: Lockdown Economic Devastation: 12% GDP Loss and Dollar Collapse Hidden in Plain Sight
articles.summary: New analysis reveals lockdowns destroyed 12% of GDP while stealing half of Americans' purchasing power through inflation. The economic carnage from COVID policies continues to be downplayed by mainstream economists and policymakers.

articles.title: Moderna's Ebola mRNA Experiment — Same Failed Technology, New Disease Target
articles.summary: Jessica Rose exposes Moderna's plan to deploy modified mRNA technology for Ebola Bundibugyo, despite mounting evidence of mRNA vaccine failures and safety signals. The company continues pushing experimental gene therapy while ignoring proven alternatives.

articles.title: Science Journalism's Corruption Problem — How Pharma Talking Points Masquerade as Medical News
articles.summary: Toby Rogers dissects how health science reporters function as pharmaceutical industry stenographers rather than independent journalists. These captured media outlets suppress critical analysis while amplifying industry-friendly narratives about drug safety and efficacy.

articles.title: Independent Medicine Under Siege — The Death of the Physician-Patient Relationship
articles.summary: Analysis of how modern healthcare has abandoned the independent physician model exemplified by Dr. Charles Augustus Leale. Corporate medicine and regulatory capture are systematically destroying doctors who prioritize patient care over institutional protocols.

articles.title: Ozempic Cancer Study — Pharma's New Wonder Drug Narrative Ignores Serious Safety Signals
articles.summary: University of Pennsylvania researchers claim Ozempic reduces breast cancer risk by 30%, but this premature celebration ignores mounting reports of severe side effects and unknown long-term consequences. Another case of industry-funded research promoting blockbuster drugs.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Alzheimer's Deception — Billions Wasted While Real Cures Sit Buried
articles.summary: Despite $360 billion annual costs and decades of failed drug trials, pharmaceutical giants continue burying metabolic and nutritional approaches to Alzheimer's that actually reverse cognitive decline. The industry's amyloid hypothesis obsession has deliberately ignored root causes and suppressed treatments that threaten their profit model.

articles.title: Ozempic's Hidden Suicide Risk — 45% Jump in Self-Harm Thoughts Buried by Novo Nordisk
articles.summary: World Health Organization data reveals semaglutide (Ozempic/Wegovy) triggers a 45% increase in suicidal ideation, yet regulatory agencies and the manufacturer continue downplaying this devastating psychiatric side effect. The weight loss gold rush has steamrolled over patient safety.

articles.title: Moderna's Next mRNA Cash Grab — Ebola Shots Built on Failed COVID Platform
articles.summary: Fresh off their COVID windfall, Moderna is rushing modified mRNA injections for Ebola Bundibugyo to market. The company continues pushing the same dangerous technology that caused widespread adverse events, now targeting African populations for their next experimental rollout.

articles.title: Medical Journalism's Pharma Prostitution — How Science Reporters Became Industry Shills
articles.summary: Health science reporters have abandoned investigative journalism to become pharmaceutical industry stenographers, parroting press releases while ignoring safety signals and suppressed data. This systemic corruption of medical journalism enables the continued poisoning of public health discourse.

articles.title: Public Health Tyranny Goes Viral — Man Jailed for Hantavirus 'Exposure' Without Infection
articles.summary: Government health authorities are now imprisoning citizens for mere exposure to pathogens, even without actual infection or transmission risk. This represents a terrifying expansion of public health police powers that criminalizes normal human interaction and biological existence.

articles.title: Iron Breakthrough Threatens Big Pharma's Rare Metal Monopoly on Drug Manufacturing
articles.summary: Nagoya University researchers proved abundant iron can replace expensive rare metals in pharmaceutical synthesis, potentially slashing drug costs by 90%. The discovery threatens the industry's artificial scarcity model and will likely face fierce suppression from chemical cartels.

articles.title: Exercise Science Vindicated — Three Studies Prove What Big Pharma Wants You to Ignore
articles.summary: New research confirms exercise provides superior longevity and health benefits compared to pharmaceutical interventions, yet the medical establishment continues pushing pills over movement. These findings threaten the chronic disease management model that generates trillions in ongoing revenue.

articles.title: Lockdown's $50 Trillion Theft — Half Your Purchasing Power Stolen in COVID Hysteria
articles.summary: Official data reveals lockdowns caused a 12% GDP loss and destroyed 50% of dollar purchasing power through deliberate inflation. The economic devastation was engineered to transfer unprecedented wealth to pharmaceutical companies and tech oligarchs while impoverishing the middle class.
